title: aira flexuosa var. diffusa
intro: Aira flexuosa var. diffusa is a type of grassy plant also known as wood melick, a member of the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Aira flexuosa var. diffusa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe irritated mucous membranes, and promote healthy digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
